---
title: "Build Your First Behaviour Model"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Build Your First Behaviour Model}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

This page is kept as a short bridge for readers who arrive from an older link.

The beginner path now teaches training and prediction together on one shared page, because they are two starting points for the same `moover` workflow.

Go here instead:

- [Chapter 5. Train, Validate, Export, and Predict](train-and-predict-with-real-data.html#walkthrough-1)
- [Chapter 6. Predict Behaviour with a Shipped Model](train-and-predict-with-real-data.html#walkthrough-2)

<div class="moover-next-steps">
<strong>Move through the tutorial</strong><br>
Previous chapter: <a href="recording-observations.html">Chapter 4. Record Observations for Training</a><br>
Next chapter: <a href="train-and-predict-with-real-data.html#walkthrough-1">Chapter 5. Train, Validate, Export, and Predict</a>
</div>
